proposed_hypotheses.text: Older age (`age_years`) is associated with lower probability of `objective_response`.
Female patients (`sex_female`=1) have a different probability of `objective_response` than males.
Higher `ecog_ps` is associated with lower `objective_response` rate.

analyses.result_summary: Logistic regression: log-OR per year of age = 0.00040 (p=0.718).

analyses.code: two-prop z-test on objective_response by sex_female

analyses.result_summary: Logistic regression: log-OR per ECOG point = -0.3837 (p=1.84e-97).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `secondary_aml`=1 have a lower `objective_response` rate than de-novo AML.
Patients with `complex_karyotype`=1 have a lower `objective_response` rate.
Higher `blast_pct_marrow` is associated with lower `objective_response` rate.
Patients flagged `unfit_for_intensive`=1 have a lower `objective_response` rate.

`npm1_mutation`=1 patients have a different `objective_response` rate than NPM1-wild-type.
`tp53_mutation`=1 patients have a lower `objective_response` rate than TP53-wild-type.

Among `flt3_tkd`=1 patients, `treatment_gilteritinib`=1 yields a higher `objective_response` rate than no gilteritinib.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among `idh1_mutation`=1 patients, `treatment_ivosidenib`=1 yields a higher `objective_response` rate than no ivosidenib (positive treatment-mutation interaction).
Among `idh2_mutation`=1 patients, `treatment_enasidenib`=1 yields a higher `objective_response` rate than no enasidenib (positive treatment-mutation interaction).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among `npm1_mutation`=1 patients, `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine`=1 yields a higher `objective_response` rate than no ven/aza (positive interaction).
Among `tp53_mutation`=1 patients, `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine`=1 yields a different `objective_response` rate than no ven/aza.
Among patients with any IDH mutation (`idh1_mutation`=1 OR `idh2_mutation`=1), `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine`=1 yields a higher response rate.
Overall, `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine`=1 is associated with a higher `objective_response` rate than no ven/aza (main effect).

analyses.result_summary: NPM1+ ven/aza+=0.193 (n=6025); NPM1+ ven/aza-=0.160. Tx effect in NPM1+ : +0.0337. Interaction coef=+0.2608, p=6.65e-07.
TP53+ ven/aza+=0.164 (n=2048); TP53+ ven/aza-=0.167. Tx effect in TP53+ : -0.0036. Interaction coef=-0.0873, p=0.285.
any_idh+ ven/aza+=0.219 (n=3356); any_idh+ ven/aza-=0.170. Tx effect=+0.0495. Interaction coef=+0.3253, p=1.9e-07.

The `treatment_7plus3`=1 effect on `objective_response` weakens with older `age_years` (negative interaction with age).
Among `unfit_for_intensive`=1 patients, `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine`=1 yields a higher `objective_response` rate than no ven/aza.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `npm1_mutation`=1 AND `flt3_itd`=0 (favorable molecular class) have a higher `objective_response` rate than patients with `npm1_mutation`=0 OR `flt3_itd`=1.

REFINED: The benefit of `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` on `objective_response` is concentrated in the `npm1_mutation`=1 AND `flt3_itd`=0 favorable subgroup, with a larger absolute response-rate increase than in NPM1-wild-type patients.

proposed_hypotheses.text: REFINED: Among patients with any IDH mutation (`idh1_mutation`=1 OR `idh2_mutation`=1), `treatment_enasidenib`=1 is associated with a higher `objective_response` rate.
REFINED: Among patients with any IDH mutation, `treatment_ivosidenib`=1 is associated with a different `objective_response` rate.
REFINED: Receipt of any IDH inhibitor (`treatment_ivosidenib`=1 OR `treatment_enasidenib`=1) within IDH-mutant patients is associated with a different `objective_response` rate than no IDH inhibitor.

analyses.result_summary: any_idh+ ena+=0.184 (n=637); any_idh+ ena-=0.190. Tx effect in IDH+ = -0.0066. Interaction p=0.856.
any_idh+ ivo+=0.175 (n=630); any_idh+ ivo-=0.191. Tx effect in IDH+ = -0.0165. Interaction p=0.204.
IDH+ + IDHi+=0.181 (n=1213); IDH+ + IDHi-=0.191. Tx effect in IDH+ = -0.0099. Interaction p=0.626.

proposed_hypotheses.text: REFINED: Within `idh1_mutation`=1, `treatment_ivosidenib`=1 is associated with a LOWER `objective_response` rate than no ivosidenib (i.e., the apparent IDH1-only main-effect benefit of ~22% is NOT augmented — and may be reduced — by ivosidenib in this dataset).
REFINED: The IDH1-mutation-associated higher response is concentrated in IDH1+ patients NOT receiving ivosidenib.

analyses.result_summary: IDH1+ ivo+=0.174 (n=298); IDH1+ ivo-=0.225; IDH1- ivo+=0.171; IDH1- ivo-=0.164. Tx effect in IDH1+ = -0.0510. Interaction log-OR = -0.3641, p=0.0271.

analyses.code: Stratified response rates by idh1_mutation x treatment_ivosidenib
analyses.result_summary: Response rates: IDH1+/ivo-=0.225, IDH1+/ivo+=0.174, IDH1-/ivo-=0.164, IDH1-/ivo+=0.171. Difference IDH1+ /ivo- minus overall = +0.0565.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for ECOG, mutations, treatment, blasts, and labs, older `age_years` remains independently associated with lower `objective_response`.
After multivariable adjustment, `idh1_mutation`=1 remains independently associated with higher `objective_response`.
After multivariable adjustment, `complex_karyotype`=1 remains independently associated with lower `objective_response`.
After multivariable adjustment, `unfit_for_intensive`=1 remains independently associated with lower `objective_response`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: REFINED: Among older (`age_years`>=70) and `unfit_for_intensive`=1 patients, `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine`=1 yields a higher `objective_response` rate than other regimens.
REFINED: Among younger (`age_years`<60) and `unfit_for_intensive`=0 patients, `treatment_7plus3`=1 yields a higher `objective_response` rate than no 7+3.
REFINED: The benefit of `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` on `objective_response` increases with `age_years` (positive interaction).

analyses.code: two-prop z-test in subset (age>=70 & unfit) on objective_response by treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine
analyses.result_summary: Older+unfit subset (n=8736): VenAza+ 0.176 (n=3447) vs VenAza- 0.165 (n=5289); diff=+0.0101, p=0.22.

analyses.code: two-prop z-test in subset (age<60 & fit) on objective_response by treatment_7plus3

analyses.result_summary: Interaction log-OR per year (venaza x age) = -6.8558e-05, p=0.976.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among `snp_rs4244285` (CYP2C19*2) carriers, `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine`=1 has a different effect on `objective_response` than in non-carriers (gene-drug interaction).
Among `snp_rs429358` (APOE) carriers, `treatment_7plus3`=1 has a different effect on `objective_response` than in non-carriers.
Among `snp_rs1801133` (MTHFR C677T) carriers, `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine`=1 has a different effect on `objective_response`.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction log-OR (treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine x snp_rs4244285 carrier) = +0.051468, p=0.378.
Interaction log-OR (treatment_7plus3 x snp_rs429358 carrier) = +0.16027, p=0.0173.
Interaction log-OR (treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine x snp_rs1801133 carrier) = +0.018483, p=0.726.

proposed_hypotheses.text: FINAL: After multivariable adjustment in a model that includes treatment-mutation interaction terms, `idh1_mutation` retains an independent positive association with `objective_response` (regardless of treatment received).

FINAL: After multivariable adjustment in a full model with treatment-mutation interactions, the `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine`:`npm1_mutation` interaction term is positive and statistically significant, indicating venetoclax/azacitidine benefits NPM1-mutant patients more than NPM1-wild-type patients.
FINAL: After multivariable adjustment with treatment-mutation interactions, `unfit_for_intensive`=1 remains independently associated with lower `objective_response`.
FINAL: After multivariable adjustment with treatment-mutation interactions, the favorable molecular class (NPM1+ / FLT3-ITD-) remains positively associated with `objective_response`.
